title: senecio glabrescens
intro: Senecio glabrescens, also known as Woolly Groundsel, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio glabrescens include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health issues.
